meta.title: VPNFilter Deep Dive
meta.description: The definitive video on the ICS module in VPNFilter from Carl Hurd and the team at Talos. The fact that this Modbus / HTTP module was so targeted (one device and selected IP) and yet did so little (logging only) is one of the mysteries. An overview of VPNFilter and detail on that ICS module. Another good example of a S4 Stage 2: Technical Deep Dive.
